Why This Works

  • ✓ Describes YOUR brand - warm, nostalgic, handcrafted
  • ✓ Specific details - "golden-brown skin with embossed pattern"
  • ✓ Emotion & memory - "grandmother kitchen", "Mid-Autumn"
  • ✓ Not generic - no "white studio background" spam
  • ✓ Unique vibe - sets you apart from others
